crime.value: House fire killing family of four, officially ruled non-arson but potentially murder
crime.quote: Number 17, Hartley Road, Trowbridge burned down earlier this morning. The four members of the Carlton family have all died.

victim.value: The Carlton family - wife attempting to leave abusive husband Harry Carlton
victim.quote: If she tries to leave me, I'll bloody kill 'em. All of 'em. Burn the whole bloody place down. She's my wife.

culprit_and_motive.value: Harry Carlton killed his family to prevent his wife from leaving him and preserve his reputation
culprit_and_motive.quote: I'll kill 'em. If she tries to leave me, I'll bloody kill 'em. All of 'em. Burn the whole bloody place down.

investigator.value: Maggie, a telepathic young woman who can read minds and may investigate the Carlton family deaths
investigator.quote: What Claire wasn't aware of was the relentless, everlasting struggle Maggie went through to ignore everyones thoughts

red_herring.value: Police ruling out arson while true perpetrator used mind reading to discover arson plan

clue_fairness.value: Reader given access to Harry Carlton's murderous thoughts before Maggie acts on the information
clue_fairness.quote: I'll kill 'em. If she tries to leave me, I'll bloody kill 'em. All of 'em. Burn the whole bloody place down.

social_world.value: University students with class distinctions, religious family constraints affecting friendship dynamics
social_world.quote: sacrificing everything she was taught about the world by her restrained, religious parents

reveal_mechanic.value: Telepathic revelation of past crime through mental connection during train journey
reveal_mechanic.quote: This morning... the news... family of four...

media_and_audience.value: Television news reports the Carlton family fire as accident, shaping public perception
media_and_audience.quote: She saw it on the news. Number 17, Hartley Road, Trowbridge burned down earlier this morning.

investigator_wound.value: Maggie's guilt over failing to prevent the Carlton family deaths despite having telepathic abilities
investigator_wound.quote: That feeling was all too familiar. This morning... the news... family of four...

_meta.title: ebook daisy graham the perfect spy
